texto: ...'you have to ask yourself though, who are we to stop a war?’I sigh, wishing that the glittering pinpricks above us were truly stars. It was rare to see any due to the endless cloud cover. ‘Who are we not to?’ I say, to no one in particular. If we weren’t willing to try, then what did that say about us? I try to ignore the pessimistic voice eating away at my thoughts. Change could start with a few, but real change needed thousands.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de H.J. Stephens que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “...'you have to ask yourself though, who are we to stop a war?’I sigh, wishing that the glitterin…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, books, confusion, com foco em mudanca e inspiracao.
